description: You are a Systems Analyst at a healthcare IT consultancy designing the architecture for a new Electronic Health Records (EHR) system. Create a 3-page UML design document in Wondershare EdrawMax using a professional theme. Include a UML Class Diagram modeling core domain entities (Patient, Doctor, Appointment, Prescription, MedicalRecord, and Department) with named attributes and multiplicity labels; a UML Use Case Diagram featuring at least four actors (Patient, Doctor, Nurse, and Administrator) and at least eight distinct use cases with associations; and a UML Sequence Diagram for the 'Schedule Appointment' use case showing message-passing between at least four lifelines (Patient, Web Interface, Appointment Service, and Database). Save the document to /home/ga/ehr_uml_design.eddx.
